rootCauseHypothesis: buildQuery() incorrectly treats every non-default non-empty allowed status as invalid, while the compact Filter trigger incorrectly reuses the reset-eligibility predicate instead of representing unconditional access to the filter surface.

rootCauseInvestigation.statusRewrite: parseRouteQuery() accepts '', 20, 21, and 22, but buildQuery() previously preserved only '' and 21 and rewrote 20/22 to 21.
rootCauseInvestigation.compactAccess: The compact Filter trigger used :disabled="!canReset" even though canReset describes whether Clear has work to do, not whether the filter surface is available.
rootCauseInvestigation.focusTiming: The project overlay and Naive UI complete focus restoration after the Sheet leave transition, so an immediate nextTick results focus was later overwritten by trigger restoration.
rootCauseInvestigation.sheetGeometry: The page's auto-height bottom Sheet collapsed to its header in the real browser and placed Apply/Cancel below the viewport; the established page-local 80vh Sheet sizing makes its controls reachable without changing shared visual policy.

defectsReproducedBeforePatch.observation: The page parsed and summarized 报名中, then Query rebuilt the route as status=21.
The page parsed and summarized 已结束, then Query rebuilt the route as status=21.
Explicit empty represented 全部 and was observably distinct from missing status, which resolved to the approved 21 default.
At the default applied state the compact Filter trigger was disabled, had tabIndex -1, and could not expose status/type/date controls.
Clear and Filter shared canReset even though Clear is conditional and Filter is an unconditional access action.

implementation: buildQuery() now preserves every value in the existing ALLOWED_STATUS set and retains the defensive default for unexpected internal values.
The compact Filter trigger no longer uses canReset or isFetching; canReset remains limited to Clear actions.
The trigger exposes aria-expanded and aria-controls, and the controlled ProductSheet owns the matching id.
The page gives the filter Sheet an established 80vh height so Apply and Cancel remain reachable across required compact widths.

ProductDrawer and ProductSheet minimally expose the existing after-leave lifecycle as a typed event because real-browser evidence proved that the required Apply focus cannot reliably be scheduled before overlay focus restoration completes.
Valid compact Apply sets one URL state, resets page to 1, closes the Sheet, then focuses the existing results heading after leave; Cancel/Escape retains the existing trigger restoration path.
URL remains the sole owner of applied filters and page; the existing local draft remains separate.

staticPath: parseRouteQuery validates the status allowlist and supplies the missing-status default
the query key includes the normalized filters and page
productApi maps non-empty actflag with Number(normalized.actflag) and explicit empty to numeric 0
repositoryRequestEvidence.networkInspectorNote: The selected in-app Browser exposes DOM, interaction, console, viewport, and page state but no raw request-body inspector. Matching actflag values are therefore established by the exact repository mapping plus distinct real public result states, without instrumenting or modifying production code.

compactFilterAccessContract.clearAtDefault: not rendered in the compact applied summary; desktop Clear remains disabled
compactFilterAccessContract.clearWhenChanged: enabled and resets to the approved default
compactFilterAccessContract.filterDuringFetchPolicy: has no canReset or isFetching disablement

filesChanged.purpose: Preserve allowed status values; separate Filter access from Clear eligibility; add truthful ARIA, reachable Sheet geometry, and post-leave Apply focus.
Expose Naive UI's existing after-leave lifecycle as a typed project-adapter event.
Forward the typed after-leave lifecycle to the page consumer.

staticValidation.command: pnpm exec vite build --outDir <temporary external directory>
staticValidation.detail: Vite 8.1.4 transformed 3224 modules; temporary output was outside the repository and removed.

desktop.combinedApply: search=周末, status=22, type=1, date=2026-06 remained intact and focused 赛事结果

compact.result: Filter enabled at default; open/cancel/apply/invalid-date/page-reset/focus contracts passed.
Filter enabled at default; controlled Sheet and reachable actions passed; Escape returned focus to Filter.
Filter enabled at default; controlled Sheet and reachable actions passed; Escape returned focus to Filter.

browserValidation.pagination: status=20 remained status=20 on page=2; results heading focused; real result meta was page 2 / 910.
browserValidation.refresh: A hard navigation to status=20&page=2 retained URL, summary, 18194-result total, and page 2.
browserValidation.history: One Back restored status=20&page=2 and one Forward restored status=20 page 1, with no intermediate query entry.
browserValidation.invalidStatus: status=99 was replaced with status=21, correction notice rendered, and static request tracing proved 99 never reached actflag.
browserValidation.invalidDate: month=13 kept the Sheet open, left the URL unchanged, rendered the existing error, and focused the invalid month input.
browserValidation.retainedAccess: Filter remained enabled and tabbable before, during, and after query-driven state changes; it has no fetching disablement.
browserValidation.themes: Real UI selection verified nonblank light and dark rendering, then restored the original system preference.
browserValidation.focus: Cancel/Escape restored Filter; Apply settled on 赛事结果 after the Sheet left; pagination settled on 赛事结果; invalid date settled on the month input.
browserValidation.reducedMotion: The current browser reported prefers-reduced-motion=false. Browser capability discovery exposed viewport and visibility only, so reduce emulation was unavailable; the global 0.01ms reduced-motion rule in src/styles/base.css was verified and this slice changes no motion CSS.

limitations: No raw browser request-body inspector was available on the selected in-app Browser; repository request-body evidence is the exact production mapping plus distinct real public results.
The selected Browser could not emulate prefers-reduced-motion; current preference, the active global fallback rule, and the absence of motion changes were verified instead.
No screenshots, recordings, browser scripts, automated tests, fixtures, mocks, or sample data were created, as required.

remainingSkeletonBlockers.summary: Competition detail can remain in dependent endless loading states.
Responsive workspace context ownership remains duplicated.
Focus can be lost after accepting board-editor discard.
Venue display completeness/truncation above 100 entries remains unresolved.
